goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'broxbourne' and should 'leave at 11:00'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'scott polar museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
